subcodes.first_line: O Lord! What exalted palace hast Thou raised for Thy loved ones, whereby the vault of Saturn hath become as a prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند بهر احبایت چه ایوان بلندی بنیاد فرمودی که طاق کیوان مانند زندان شد و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
